from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List

app = FastAPI()


class BulkResult(BaseModel):
    succeeded: List[dict]
    failed: List[dict]
    partial: bool


@app.post("/users/batch", response_model=BulkResult)
async def create_users(users: list[dict]):
    succeeded = []
    failed = []
    for user_data in users:
        try:
            user = create_user(user_data)
            succeeded.append({"id": user.id, "email": user_data["email"]})
        except Exception as e:
            failed.append({"email": user_data.get("email"), "error": str(e)})

    return BulkResult(
        succeeded=succeeded,
        failed=failed,
        partial=len(failed) > 0 and len(succeeded) > 0,
    )


@app.post("/orders/batch/all-or-nothing")
async def create_orders_batch(orders: list[dict]):
    try:
        for order_data in orders:
            validate_order(order_data)
        results = bulk_create_orders(orders)
        return {"status": "completed", "orders": results}
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": "rolled_back", "error": str(e)}
